summary: Comprehensive testing of Sales Management App v22 - All features working. Backend: 28/28 tests pass. Frontend: All key flows verified including login (4 users), dashboard KPIs, category toggle, company averages (3 salespeople label, 2 in calc), status tabs, pipeline with last interaction dates, earnings, commission rules, sale conversion modal with 5 tiers + 7 SPIFFs, edit sale details, notifications, closing flow templates, mobile horizontal scroll.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working in iteration 22.

features_verified.login_all_4_users: ✓ Benjamin, Franco, Chris (3 salespeople) + Admin all login correctly
features_verified.benjamin_dashboard: ✓ R% 42.9%, Gross R% 46.8%, $388,850 revenue, 77 leads, 33 closed deals, Credit Reject 3, PM 3
features_verified.franco_dashboard: ✓ R% 43.9%, Gross R% 43.9%, $357,043 revenue, 66 leads, 29 closed deals
features_verified.chris_dashboard_0_data: ✓ R% 0%, $0 revenue, 0 leads - shows Company Average correctly
features_verified.company_averages: ✓ Shows '3 salespeople' label but calculates from 2 active (Benjamin/Franco). Avg R% 43.4%, Avg Revenue $372,946
features_verified.category_toggle: ✓ HVAC/Generators toggle works, Generator shows green theme
features_verified.accessory_sellthrough: ✓ APCO X 24%, Duct Cleaning 9%, Surge Protector 12%, Self Gen Mits 18%
features_verified.self_gen_3_percent_card: ✓ Shows Self Gen (3%) card in Sales Metrics
features_verified.status_tab_all_leads: ✓ All columns visible (Name, City, Status, Unit, Value, Visit, Actions)
features_verified.pipeline_target_button: ✓ Pipeline button (Target icon) visible for PENDING leads - 25 found
features_verified.pipeline_view: ✓ Book-style cards with progress bars, Closing Flow button, action buttons
features_verified.pipeline_last_interaction: ✓ 'Last:' interaction dates shown in pipeline cards
features_verified.earnings_tab: ✓ 27 installations, $35,944.80 commission, $8,441 SPIFF included, AVG COMM 8.85%
features_verified.edit_sale_details_button: ✓ Button visible on SALE leads, opens SaleConversionModal with pre-loaded data
features_verified.sale_conversion_modal_7_spiffs: ✓ APCO X, Surge Protector, Duct Cleaning, Self Gen Mits (4%), Self Gen (3%), Samsung ($400), Paid Accessory (1%)
features_verified.commission_auto_calculation: ✓ Shows base calculation + SPIFF breakdown in real-time
features_verified.under_book_rule: ✓ Locks APCO X, Surge, Duct but keeps Samsung, Self Gen Mits, Self Gen available
features_verified.custom_spiffs: ✓ Add SPIFF button with description and amount fields
features_verified.same_as_ticket_button: ✓ Button sets Self Gen Mits product value to ticket value
features_verified.commission_rules_endpoint: ✓ Returns 5 tiers + 7 SPIFFs, Samsung=$400, Paid Accessory=1%
features_verified.price_tier_migration: ✓ All 35 SALE leads (Benjamin) have price_tier set
features_verified.admin_overview: ✓ Company totals: 62 closed deals, $745,893 revenue, Lead Status pie chart, Equipment Revenue chart
features_verified.admin_commission_rules: ✓ Tab visible, editable tiers and SPIFFs
features_verified.notifications: ✓ Bell icon, panel opens, shows 0 active, Enable push notifications option
features_verified.closing_flow_modal: ✓ 7 steps (Day 0,2,4,6,8), customizable templates, Send button, date pickers, Settings gear
features_verified.mobile_horizontal_scroll: ✓ overflow-x-auto container on leads table enables horizontal scroll
